title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills for automation. The video covers practical strategies including agents, hooks, and loops, as well as a testing framework for skill selection and two underutilized Claude Code features.
